case_title: GEE ELLEN et al VS THAI AIRWAYS INTERNATIONAL LTD. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PHENJATI SERM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GEE ELLEN JEW EDMUND AS TO DEFENDANT THAI AIRWAYS INTERNATIONAL LTD. PHENJATI SERM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
